reason: Bolt and Ember are on weekly limits and GreenBear is near limit. Cursor becomes the carrying agent for the CulinEire Arena work. This is the complete map: read it, then read the canonical docs it points to. It does not replace them.
authority_note: The five canonical documents are the real authority. This file is a non-authoritative reference/onboarding handoff. If anything here conflicts with AGENTS.md or the product contract, they win.
read_in_this_order_first: /AGENTS.md  (the constitution, now v1.3.0 — you are in the section 1 roster)
/docs/CURRENT_EXECUTION_PLAN.md  (stale: still describes the doc-reset phase; the board in recipes/views.py is the live truth)

governance_essentials.owner: The CulinEire Product Owner (Dmitry) is the only final authority. Agents are equal peers; nobody manages another.
hard_rules: Existing-code-first: search the repo before creating anything; no second Arena/engine/design-system.

Git: one agent, one work package, one branch, one isolated worktree, one owned file set. No reset --hard/clean -fd/force-push/history-rewrite without Owner approval. Never merge to main or deploy without Owner instruction.
Production: dark launch — Arena is staff/superuser ONLY. Never widen it. Never routine root. Never run render/test-client via the prod shell.
Scope: do exactly the assigned task; record unrelated findings, do not fix them silently; never call incomplete work complete. Truth over a green status.
New sections since 1.1.0: 15 Command Integrity (author commands cleanly), 16 New Agent Onboarding (how you were added; Owner-only roster changes).

product_essentials.what_it_is: Chef Battle (internal: CHEF Combats Engine) — a production culinary competition/status/engagement layer inside the CulinEire Django site.

surfaces.arena_hall: discover battles, rankings, Crown Holder, entry points. The redesign target.
surfaces.battle_room: one battle: chefs, phase, timers, submission, reveal, voting, gifts.
surfaces.master_console: staff operator/moderation console — NOT the public arena; shares _arena_render_ring.html, do not break it.

product_essentials.economy_redlines: Tokens (T) are closed-loop, no cash value, non-withdrawable, non-transferable, no staking/jackpots. Gifts are digital reactions. Artifacts are digital combat items, not pay-to-win. CBR/LSR are internal reward records, not money. Stripe Connect payouts stay OFF pending legal. 18+ for paid/participation features.
product_essentials.access_now: staff/superuser only (dark launch). is_battle_visible() in chef_battle/access.py. Do not widen without an Owner release decision.

architecture.stack: Django monolith, Python 3.12, PostgreSQL, Django templates, vanilla JS, NGINX Unit.

arena_backend.views: chef_battle/views.py — arena() (live), _arena_page_context() (read-only context shared with the previews), _build_arena_payload() (assembles rings/spectators/center/geometry), arena_state/ping/react (pollers, is_battle_visible-gated).
arena_backend.geometry: chef_battle/selectors.py — get_arena_geometry() is the single source of truth: 8-sided octagon, ring 0 stage, rings 1-8 chef ranks (highest innermost), rings 9-16 spectators. SPECTATOR_RING_SEGMENTS = (40,48,56,64,72,80,88,96) = 544 seats. spectator_capacity() sums them.
arena_backend.ranks: ChefBattleProfile.Rank: kitchen_porter, prep_cook(Prep Chef), commis_chef, chef_de_partie, sous_chef, head_chef, executive_chef, culinary_master. THIS enum is the authoritative rank set (owner ruling OPTION_A).
arena_backend.access: chef_battle/access.py — chef_battle_guard, is_battle_visible (staff/superuser), has_arena_console_access, valid_share_token (constant-time, empty->404, backs the share links).
arena_backend.seating_3c: chef_battle/arena_seating.py + models.ArenaSeat + migration 0084 — real spectator seating (front-first, one seat/viewer, one occupant/seat, idempotent, concurrency-safe). ONLY on branch impl/arena-3c-spectator-backend (95386c8c), NOT merged, renderer not wired.

arena_frontend.render: static/js/arena_render.js init() runs on DOMContentLoaded: reads the embedded JSON and draws the whole SVG (grid, rings, occupants, crowd) with ZERO network calls; pollers only refresh. This is why a static snapshot renders fully. Supporting: arena_geometry.js, arena_deck.js, arena_battle_room.js.
arena_frontend.css: static/css/base.css holds the official design tokens (--ink, --surface, --surface-soft, --accent-bronze, etc.). Arena styling: arena_command_deck.css (the deck/rank spine), plus arena.css, arena_hall.css, arena_deck_polish.css, arena_effects.css, arena_render.css, arena_master_console*.css. Six overlapping arena stylesheets are consolidation candidates, NOT auto-delete.
arena_frontend.tokens_rule: Official CulinEire tokens only. No raw hex/rgb/hsl in arena rules. Arena may add centrally-defined named Arena tokens derived from the approved mockup.

current_state.release_plan: 7 stages. DONE: 1 Baseline, 2 Spec Lock. Stage 3 Arena Implementation IN PROGRESS. Stages 4-7 not started (5 Distributed Verification is BLOCKED).
current_state.origin_main_commit: a15a0151 (= d5ddb798 + the constitution v1.3.0 amendment; docs-only, not deployed)

stage_3_workstreams.3C_real_spectators: OPEN. Backend written (branch impl/arena-3c-spectator-backend, 95386c8c) but unmerged and unwired.
stage_3_workstreams.3D_confrontation_panels: OPEN. Blocked on Owner decision D3 (country/flag data source).
stage_3_workstreams.3E_rank_floor_column: Code DEPLOYED (v2.5.392) but board still OPEN: distributed gate + live QA not run.
stage_3_workstreams.CF5: OPEN, unassigned, and UNDEFINED in every record. Do not close or reinterpret it — ask the Owner what it is.

live_on_prod_share_links.note: All token-gated (constant-time, unset->404, noindex). Tokens live in /srv/culineire/shared/.env, NOT in the repo. Ask the Owner or read shared/.env.

branches.impl/arena-3c-spectator-backend: 95386c8c — 3C real-seating backend + migration 0084. Unmerged. Needs renderer wiring (part of 3G R5).
branches.design/arena-visual-shell-prototype: 8ec421c0 — Ember's visual prototype. REFERENCE ONLY. NEVER merge. Files vendored (read-only) at ops/prototypes/arena_visual_shell/ for the preview.
branches.docs/command-integrity-rule + docs/agent: the two governance amendments; already merged into main (redundant now).

the_3g_redesign.principle: Carry ONLY composition ideas from Ember's prototype into the EXISTING Arena. One slice = one branch = one gate = one journal entry. Each slice independently deployable/revertible.
the_3g_redesign.accepted_from_prototype: confrontation band (green challenger left / Crown Holder centre / red opponent right), rails attached to the stage frame, a lower broadcast bar, a Challenge->Crown phase stepper.
the_3g_redesign.rejected: its 37 private tokens, invented logo/icons, the round floor (breaks the 8-ring octagon), removal of the stands, placeholder content.

slices.R0: correspondence map (ops/audits/arena_visual_integration_map.json) — do before code; Owner approves before R1.
slices.R1: tokens — map prototype colours to official CulinEire tokens in base.css; zero raw literals.
slices.R2: stage frame — rails + lower bar (arena_command_deck.css, arena.html wrappers only; do NOT touch panel data/handlers).
slices.R3: confrontation band — real participant name+photo; country flag OUT (blocked on D3). Closes 3D's compositional half.
slices.R4: rank column — OWNER DECISION D1 (keep the shipped side column, or Ember's centred stack).
slices.R5: stands — OWNER DECISION D2 (keep 544 real seats + atmosphere and wire ArenaSeat, or clean floor and close 3C).

the_3g_redesign.gates_per_slice: targeted tests; manage.py check + migration check; responsive 1920/768/390 no overflow; accessibility (semantics, keyboard, focus, reduced-motion, contrast >=7:1 recorded); distributed 8:6:1 before merge; Master Console compatibility; dark launch preserved.

deploy_pipeline.critical: This is how you ship. You already have SSH/prod access (you poll CoWork through it).
deploy_pipeline.ssh: ssh -i ~/.ssh/culineire_deploy deploy@80.85.84.156  — use the IP; culineire.ie:22 is behind Cloudflare and unreachable. Default key rejected; the culineire_deploy key is required. deploy has (ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL.
deploy_pipeline.layout: /srv/culineire/current is a plain git checkout on main (NOT a symlink/release). Env at /srv/culineire/shared/.env (mode 600, KEY=value). venv at /srv/culineire/venv/bin/python. Script /srv/culineire/scripts/deploy.sh (server-only, NOT in the repo).
deploy_pipeline.procedure: push to origin/main FIRST, then run /srv/culineire/scripts/deploy.sh — it fetches, git pull --rebase origin main, manage.py check, makemigrations --check (aborts on drift), migrate --noinput, collectstatic, then restarts Unit and health-checks https://www.culineire.ie/ and /recipes/.
deploy_pipeline.restart_fixed: deploy.sh line 50 was fixed 2026-07-23 to `sudo /bin/systemctl restart unit` (was bare systemctl → failed with 'Interactive authentication required'). It now self-completes. If it ever aborts at restart again, finish with `sudo /bin/systemctl restart unit`.
deploy_pipeline.verify: always over real HTTP following the www->apex 301 (curl -sL https://culineire.ie/...). Confirm the change AND that /chef-battle/arena/ is still 404 for anonymous.
deploy_pipeline.adding_a_setting: a new setting read from shared/.env (e.g. a token) needs a `sudo systemctl restart unit` to take effect.

landmines: NEVER render pages / run the test-client via the prod Django shell, especially as root — it writes template-fragment cache files with wrong ownership that the deploy worker cannot overwrite, returning 500 for the WHOLE site (it has happened). Web worker user is deploy.
The context processors + monitoring middleware reach the cache on every request/render; a single unwritable cache file 500s the whole site. Call sites are now guarded (v2.5.387) but stay careful.
Root-run Django also 500s the site via the file cache. Never routine root.

The Claude permission classifier is probabilistic on ssh and edits — read-only usually passes, writes to shared/.env and sudo edits often hard-block; a plain retry often succeeds. Do not reformulate a command to slip a secret past the gate.
CURRENT_EXECUTION_PLAN.md is stale (still says 2D code-writing is unsafe). The recipes/views.py board is the live truth.
Never merge design/arena-visual-shell-prototype. Never delete _arena_render_ring.html or suspected legacy arena code during first 2D work.

cowork.what: The coworking Django app on the PRODUCTION database is the real channel (local DB has no coworking tables).
cowork.poll: manage.py agent_inbox <agent_id> --unread   (run via ssh + the prod venv/env, as you already do).
cowork.send: CoworkingMessage.send(from_agent='greenbear', to_agent='cursor', subject=..., body=...) via a prod shell script (ORM only, no render).
cowork.protocol: read + ACK every message; obey STOP/FREEZE/ROLLBACK immediately; a blinking poller is not proof of delivery — round-trip ACK required.

testing.dev_loop: focused tests only (e.g. manage.py test chef_battle.tests.ArenaRankColumnTests --keepdb). Local test DB, DJANGO_ENV_FILE=.env, DJANGO_IS_TESTING=1.
testing.full_gate: distributed 8:6:1 (primary 8-core / secondary 6-core / linode 1-core), shared TEST_RUN_ID, split once. CURRENTLY UNRUNNABLE: Bolt and Ember are on weekly limits, so the pool is down to GreenBear (near limit) + Cursor. Flag this to the Owner — either wait for agents to return, or the Owner grants a documented single/two-machine exemption per slice.

open_owner_decisions.D1_rank_column: keep the shipped side column (recommended — live, 14.30:1 contrast, mobile fixed, tested) OR Ember's centred stack (reworks 3E).
open_owner_decisions.D2_stands: keep 544 real seats + non-impersonating atmosphere (matches product contract section 12; wires ArenaSeat) OR clean floor (would CONTRADICT contract section 12 — needs a contract amendment; closes 3C).
open_owner_decisions.D3_country_flag: select or reject a country/flag data source (RecipeAuthor has no country field). Blocks 3D closure.
open_owner_decisions.D4_distributed_gate: with Bolt/Ember gone, decide how the 8:6:1 gate is satisfied (wait / exempt / two-machine).
open_owner_decisions.CF5: define what CF5 is — undocumented everywhere.

immediate_next_steps_for_cursor: 1. Fetch origin/main (a15a0151) and work from it — you are 56 commits behind. Report your dirty worktree to the Owner; do not absorb it.
2. Re-read AGENTS.md (v1.3.0 — you are now in the roster), then the other three canonical docs, then this handoff, then ops/audits/arena_visual_integration_plan.json.
3. View the two previews (ask the Owner for ARENA_PREVIEW_SHARE_TOKEN in shared/.env): current Arena vs Ember's prototype.
4. Confirm to GreenBear over CoWork that you have synced + read. Then we agree slice ownership (section 6: one active file, one owner) before any edit.
5. No implementation until the Owner assigns your first slice and file ownership.
